meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.

globalAlerts.warning: CRITICAL LOCAL INTEGRATION REQUIREMENT: The agent is running on a machine that has the 'claude' CLI installed. You absolutely MUST run `make integration-test-prsplit` and other integration targets defined in `project.mk` during development. Standard checks like `make all` are insufficient on their own because they skip these tests.

HARD MANDATE (NO EXCEPTIONS): For EVERY bug/regression, you MUST (1) replicate with HIGH CONFIDENCE via a failing test, (2) validate that replication FAILS via make target, and ONLY THEN (3) apply a fix. No exceptions.
ANTI-HALLUCINATION CONSTRAINT: Do NOT invent root causes or describe nonexistent logic. If you have not read the relevant code paths, add an investigation task.
TOOLING REQUIREMENT: All verification MUST use the make-based workflow. Cross-platform checks MUST pass (make all). macOS-only integration tests via project.mk targets.
RULE OF TWO (COMMIT GATE): No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent strict reviews confirm correctness.
INDEFINITE CYCLE: The task list must never become empty. Always expand scope towards True Perfection.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Execute tasks strictly in sequence. Update blueprint.json incrementally after each task.
mandatoryDirectives.sourceOfTruth: Live chunks: internal/command/pr_split_00_core.js through pr_split_13_tui.js (14 IIFE-wrapped files). Go bridge: internal/command/pr_split.go (embeds + loads all chunks via loadChunkedScript). Tests: 46+ test files in internal/command/ matching pr_split_*_test.go and prsplit_*_test.go. Chunk test helper: loadChunkEngine() in pr_split_00_core_test.go (auto-injects t.TempDir runtime.dir). Full engine helpers: loadPrSplitEngine()/loadPrSplitEngineWithEval() in pr_split_test.go. TUI: prsplit_autosplit_model.go (AutoSplitModel), prsplit_plan_editor.go (PlanEditor). Design doc: docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md. ADR: docs/adr/001-pr-split-chunked-architecture.md.
mandatoryDirectives.fullEndToEndIntegrationTesting: The -integration flag, -claude-command, -claude-arg flags registered in internal/command/main_test.go TestMain. project.mk targets: integration-test-prsplit, integration-test-prsplit-mcp, integration-test-termmux. New test functions in internal/command/ matching TestIntegration_* are automatically picked up by make integration-test-prsplit-mcp.
mandatoryDirectives.chunkArchitecture: 14 JS chunk files loaded in order by pr_split.go (loadChunkedScript). Each chunk is an IIFE that attaches exports to globalThis.prSplit (initialized by chunk 00). Chunks may reference symbols from earlier chunks via globalThis.prSplit. Go-injected globals (autoSplitTUI, tuiMux, splitView, planEditorFactory, prSplitConfig) are available to all chunks.

statusSection.currentState: Build GREEN. All tests pass (make all). make integration-test-prsplit-mcp GREEN. 15 commands registered. 14 JS chunk files loaded sequentially. 46+ pr-split test files providing extensive coverage. Two bugs fixed (B00: git state mutation, B02: PR creation empty-diff guard). B01 (ANSI in commit messages) NOT FIXED. All orphaned claude-mux code deleted. TUI components relocated to internal/command. Documentation updated. Cross-platform validated (Linux container + Windows). wip branch at e2580ac. Session started 2026-03-05 22:03:19.
statusSection.goalState: 14 independently-testable chunk files with zero bugs. B01 ANSI stripping fixed and tested. Exhaustive test coverage including error paths. Integration tests expanded (mock and real-Claude). Cross-platform validated. Wizard UI (W-series) implemented in JS via termmux facade. Every line has a reason to exist. Documentation current. No dead code. No AI slop.

sequentialTasks.task: T01: Run integration-test-prsplit-mcp and establish baseline
sequentialTasks.description: Execute make integration-test-prsplit-mcp. Verify TestIntegration_AutoSplitMockMCP and TestIntegration_AutoSplitMockMCP_TUIObservation both pass. Document current output as baseline.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Both mock MCP integration tests pass. Output captured in build.log. Baseline established for regression detection.

sequentialTasks.task: T02: Run integration-test-termmux and verify
sequentialTasks.description: Execute make integration-test-termmux. Verify all termmux integration tests pass with -tags=integration.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All termmux integration tests pass. No flaky failures.

sequentialTasks.task: T03: B01 - Add stripAnsi() utility to pr_split_00_core.js
sequentialTasks.description: Implement a stripAnsi(str) function in pr_split_00_core.js that removes all ANSI escape sequences from a string. Use regex: /\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]/g for CSI sequences, /\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07/g for OSC sequences, and /\x1b[^\[\]][^a-zA-Z]*/g for other escapes. Export via globalThis.prSplit._stripAnsi. Place after the style section (~line 100).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: stripAnsi('\x1b[32mgreen\x1b[0m') returns 'green'. stripAnsi('no ansi') returns 'no ansi'. stripAnsi('') returns ''. Function exported on globalThis.prSplit._stripAnsi.

sequentialTasks.task: T04: B01 - Add unit tests for stripAnsi() in pr_split_00_core_test.go
sequentialTasks.description: Add TestChunk00_StripAnsi test function. Test cases: plain text unchanged, single color code stripped, nested codes stripped, empty string, OSC sequences stripped, mixed styled+unstyled content. Use loadChunkEngine() helper.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: 6+ test cases covering all ANSI patterns. Tests pass via make all.

sequentialTasks.task: T05: B01 - Apply stripAnsi() in pr_split_05_execution.js before git commit
sequentialTasks.description: At pr_split_05_execution.js line 191, wrap: var msg = prSplit._stripAnsi(split.message || 'split: ' + split.name). Add comment: '// B01 fix: strip ANSI escape codes from commit messages'.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Commit messages guaranteed free of ANSI escape sequences. stripAnsi applied unconditionally.

sequentialTasks.task: T06: B01 - Add test proving ANSI codes stripped from commits
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_05_execution_test.go, add TestChunk05_ExecuteSplit_ANSIInMessage. Set split.message to '\x1b[32mAdd feature\x1b[0m'. Execute split. Verify git log --format=%s shows 'Add feature' (no ANSI).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Test creates commit with ANSI-contaminated message, verifies git log message is clean.

sequentialTasks.task: T07: B01 - Audit all chunks for ANSI contamination paths
sequentialTasks.description: Search all pr_split_*.js for paths where styled text could flow into git operations. Check: pr_split_03_planning.js:55 (message field), pr_split_10_pipeline.js:1495 (message), pr_split_13_tui.js:801 (message). Add stripAnsi() wherever contamination is possible.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All 14 chunks audited. Every path from styled text to git/file/external operations sanitized.

sequentialTasks.task: T08: B01 verification gate - make all + integration tests
sequentialTasks.description: Run make all and make integration-test-prsplit-mcp. All tests pass including new stripAnsi tests.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make all GREEN. make integration-test-prsplit-mcp GREEN. Zero regressions.

sequentialTasks.task: T09: Test double-ANSI-styling in renderColorizedDiff
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_11_utilities_test.go, add TestChunk11_RenderColorizedDiff_PreColoredInput. Pass pre-ANSI-colored diff through renderColorizedDiff(). Verify no double-styling.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Test proves renderColorizedDiff handles pre-colored input correctly.

sequentialTasks.task: T10: Test gh CLI not found error in chunk 07
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_07_prcreation_test.go, add TestChunk07_CreatePRs_GhNotFound. Mock exec to fail for 'gh'. Verify clear error message.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: gh-not-found produces clear, actionable error. Does not crash or return undefined.

sequentialTasks.task: T11: Test all AUTO_FIX_STRATEGIES in chunk 08
sequentialTasks.description: In pr_split_08_conflict_test.go, add tests for each strategy: detection logic, fix application, strategy fallthrough on failure.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Every AUTO_FIX_STRATEGY has direct test coverage. Fallthrough path tested.

sequentialTasks.acceptance: Model-unavailable error handled with clear message. No hang or undefined behavior.

continuousVerification.task: CRITICAL: Run make pipeline AND ALL LOCAL INTEGRATION TESTS after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.description: MANDATORY: Run make all AND make integration-test-prsplit-mcp AND make integration-test-termmux after every change batch. For real-Claude tests: make integration-test-prsplit. For Linux: make make-all-in-container.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY check fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix. Zero tolerance for flaky tests.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: Do not claim a regression is fixed without test evidence.
No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent reviews confirm correctness.
Every line must have a reason to exist. No vestigial code, no contradictory logic, no untested paths.
